songs.t: When The World Is Running Down

lyrics.1:
You could say I lost my faith in science and progress
You could say I lost my belief in the Holy Church
You could say I lost my sense of direction
And you could say all of this and worse but
If I ever lose my faith in you
There'd be nothing left for me to do
Some would say I was a lost man in a lost world
You could say I lost my faith in the people on TV
You could say I lost my belief in our politicians
They all seemed like game show hosts to me
If I ever lose my faith in you
There'd be nothing left for me to do
I could be lost inside their lies without a trace
But every time I close my eyes I see your face
I never saw no miracle of science
That didn't go from a, a blessing to a curse
Never saw no military solution
That didn't always end up as something worse but
Let me say this first
If I ever lose my faith in you
If I ever lose my faith in you
There'd be nothing left for me to do
There'd be nothing left for me to do
If I ever lose my faith
If I ever lose my faith
If I ever lose my faith
If I ever lose my faith
In you
lyrics.2:
He deals the cards as a meditation
And those he plays never suspect
He doesn't play for the money he wins
He doesn't play for respect
He deals the cards to find the answer
The sacred geometry of chance
The hidden law of a probable outcome
The numbers lead a dance
I know that the spades are the swords of a soldier
I know that the clubs are weapons of war
I know that diamonds mean money for this art
But that's not the shape of my heart
He may play the jack of diamonds
He may lay the queen of spades
He may conceal a king in his hand
While the memory of it fades
I know that the spades are the swords of a soldier
I know that the clubs are weapons of war
I know that diamonds mean money for this art
But that's not the shape of my heart
That's not the shape
The shape of my heart
And if I told you that I loved you
You'd maybe think there's something wrong
I'm not a man of too many faces
The mask I wear is one
But those who speak know nothing
And find out to their cost
Like those who curse their luck in too many places
And those who fear are lost
I know that the spades are the swords of a soldier
I know that the clubs are weapons of war
I know that diamonds mean money for this art
But that's not the shape of my heart
That's not the shape of my heart
That's not the shape
The shape of my heart
lyrics.3:
How can you say that you're not responsible?
What does it have to do with me?
What is my reaction, what should it be?
Confronted by this latest atrocity
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Hide my face in my hands
Shame wells in my throat
My comfortable existence
Is reduced to a shallow meaningless party
Seems that when some innocent die
All we can offer them is a page in a some magazine
Too many cameras and not enough food
This is what we've seen
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Woh oh oh
Woh oh oh
Woh oh oh
Woh oh oh
Protest is futile
Nothing seems to get through
What's to become of our world?
Who knows what to do?
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
Driven to tears
lyrics.9:
cute like johnny depp,funny like danny defoe,
novelist, stubborn like marx or manson
you slid into my life,
you made this day go by,
tell me what happened
that makes you shy now?
why dreaming about sumatra,
dimitri,
if a big thang's
just a breath away
why talking about surinam,
boy,
if you
don't bother me.
why dreaming about trinidad,
dimitri,
if things flow
like an autobahn?
why humming like a dragonfly
boy, if you
could fly with me.

cute like johnny depp,
funny like danny defoe,
novelist, stubborn like marx or manson;
you really made my day,
our time was flowing away,
tell me what happened
that makes you sigh now?
why dreaming about sumatra,
dimitri,
if the big wave's
just a breath away
why talking about surinam,
boy, you
don't bother me.
why dreaming about trinidad,
dimitri,
if things flow
like an autobahn?
walking like a dinosaur,
boy, means you
won't follow me.
why dreaming about sumatra,
dimitri,
if a big thang's
just a breath away
why talking about surinam,
boy, if you
don't bother me.
why dreaming about trinidad,
dimitri,
if things flow
like an autobahn?
why humming like a dragonfly
boy, if you
could fly with me.
lyrics.22:
I can′t remember when I last felt this way
I can't remember when the clouds and the rain couldn′t dull my day
I can't remember having a feeling so fine
I can't remember when you weren′t the one that was on my mind
Maybe your smile
Or maybe your style
Makes me wanna
With you
I can′t remember when I last felt this way
I can't remember when the clouds and the rain couldn′t dull my day
I can't remember having a feeling so fine
I can′t remember when you weren't the one that was on my mind
You don′t have to try
It's all in your eyes
Makes me wanna
With you
I can't remember when I last felt this way
I can′t remember when the clouds and the rain couldn′t dull my day
I can't remember having a feeling so fine
I can′t remember when you weren't the one that was on my mind
Maybe your smile
Or maybe your style
Makes me wanna
With you
